ratings.comment: Definitely recommend taking Chase over other professors for RE 415. Super nice guy and is extremely clear about what will be tested for exams. Appraisal project is a lot of work regardless of who the professor is but Chase was always very helpful if you just go to office hours.

Chase is a great professor. He knows his field well and is usually on the same page as his students. Very reasonable on exams and grading, good guy overall. Would definitely take him again and recommend to others.
